Class Player

java.lang.Object
Player
public class Player extends Object
Represents a player in the Blackjack game. Handles hand management, betting, splitting, and balance operations.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Player(String name)
    Constructs a Player with a name and default balance.
    Player(String name, int balance)
    Constructs a Player with a name and starting balance.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    canSplit()
    Checks if the player can split their hand.
    void
    clearHand()
    Clears the player's hands and resets split state and bets.
    void
    doubleDown(Card card)
    Doubles the player's current bet and adds a card to the hand.
    Hand
    getActiveHand()
    Gets the currently active hand (main or split).
    int
    getActiveScore()
    Gets the score of the currently active hand.
    int

    Gets the player's current balance.
    int

    Gets the player's current bet amount.
    Hand
    getHand()
    Gets the player's main hand.
    String
    getName()
    Gets the player's name.
    int
    getScore()
    Gets the score of the player's main hand.
    int
    getSplitBet()
    Gets the player's split bet amount.
    Hand
    getSplitHand()
    Gets the player's split hand.
    boolean
    hasSplitHand()
    Checks if the player currently has a split hand.
    boolean
    isActiveBust()
    Checks if the currently active hand is bust.
    boolean
    isBlackjack()
    Checks if the player's main hand is a Blackjack.
    boolean
    isBust()
    Checks if the player's main hand is bust.
    boolean
    isPlayingSplitHand()
    Checks if the player is currently playing the split hand.
    void
    loseSplitBet()
    Handles loss of the split bet (no action needed as bet is already deducted).
    void
    placeBet(int amount)
    Places a bet by deducting the amount from the player's balance.
    void
    receiveCard(Card card)
    Adds a card to the player's main hand.
    void
    receiveCardToActive(Card card)
    Adds a card to the currently active hand.
    void
    receiveCardToSplit(Card card)
    Adds a card to the player's split hand.
    void
    setBalance(int balance)
    Sets the player's balance.
    int
    setCurrentBet(int amount)
    Sets the player's current bet amount.
    void
    split(Card cardForMain, Card cardForSplit)
    Splits the player's hand into two and deals new cards to each.
    void
    switchToSplitHand()
    Switches the active hand to the split hand.
    void
    tieBet()
    Returns the main bet to the player's balance in case of a tie.
    void
    tieSplitBet()
    Returns the split bet to the player's balance in case of a tie.
    void
    winBet()
    Awards winnings for the main bet to the player's balance.
    void
    winSplitBet()
    Awards winnings for the split bet to the player's balance.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Player

      public Player(String name, int balance)
      Constructs a Player with a name and starting balance.
      Parameters:
      name - The player's name.
      balance - The starting balance for the player.

    • Player

      public Player(String name)
      Constructs a Player with a name and default balance.
      Parameters:
      name - The player's name.

  • Method Details

    • receiveCard

      public void receiveCard(Card card)
      Adds a card to the player's main hand.
      Parameters:
      card - The card to add.

    • receiveCardToSplit

      public void receiveCardToSplit(Card card)
      Adds a card to the player's split hand.
      Parameters:
      card - The card to add.

    • getScore

      public int getScore()
      Gets the score of the player's main hand.
      Returns:
      The score of the main hand.

    • isBust

      public boolean isBust()
      Checks if the player's main hand is bust.
      Returns:
      true if bust, false otherwise.

    • isBlackjack

      public boolean isBlackjack()
      Checks if the player's main hand is a Blackjack.
      Returns:
      true if Blackjack, false otherwise.

    • clearHand

      public void clearHand()
      Clears the player's hands and resets split state and bets.

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Gets the player's name.
      Returns:
      The player's name.

    • getHand

      public Hand getHand()
      Gets the player's main hand.
      Returns:
      The main Hand object.

    • getBalance

      public int getBalance()
      Gets the player's current balance.
      Returns:
      The player's balance.

    • setBalance

      public void setBalance(int balance)
      Sets the player's balance.
      Parameters:
      balance - The new balance to set.

    • getCurrentBet

      public int getCurrentBet()
      Gets the player's current bet amount.
      Returns:
      The current bet.

    • setCurrentBet

      public int setCurrentBet(int amount)
      Sets the player's current bet amount.
      Parameters:
      amount - The amount to set as current bet.
      Returns:
      The updated current bet.

    • placeBet

      public void placeBet(int amount)
      Places a bet by deducting the amount from the player's balance.
      Parameters:
      amount - The amount to bet.

    • doubleDown

      public void doubleDown(Card card)
      Doubles the player's current bet and adds a card to the hand.
      Parameters:
      card - The card to add.

    • canSplit

      public boolean canSplit()
      Checks if the player can split their hand.
      Returns:
      true if split is possible, false otherwise.

    • split

      public void split(Card cardForMain, Card cardForSplit)
      Splits the player's hand into two and deals new cards to each.
      Parameters:
      cardForMain - Card to add to the main hand.
      cardForSplit - Card to add to the split hand.

    • hasSplitHand

      public boolean hasSplitHand()
      Checks if the player currently has a split hand.
      Returns:
      true if split hand exists, false otherwise.

    • isPlayingSplitHand

      public boolean isPlayingSplitHand()
      Checks if the player is currently playing the split hand.
      Returns:
      true if playing split hand, false otherwise.

    • switchToSplitHand

      public void switchToSplitHand()
      Switches the active hand to the split hand.

    • getSplitHand

      public Hand getSplitHand()
      Gets the player's split hand.
      Returns:
      The split Hand object.

    • getSplitBet

      public int getSplitBet()
      Gets the player's split bet amount.
      Returns:
      The split bet amount.

    • getActiveHand

      public Hand getActiveHand()
      Gets the currently active hand (main or split).
      Returns:
      The active Hand object.

    • receiveCardToActive

      public void receiveCardToActive(Card card)
      Adds a card to the currently active hand.
      Parameters:
      card - The card to add.

    • getActiveScore

      public int getActiveScore()
      Gets the score of the currently active hand.
      Returns:
      The score of the active hand.

    • isActiveBust

      public boolean isActiveBust()
      Checks if the currently active hand is bust.
      Returns:
      true if active hand is bust, false otherwise.

    • winBet

      public void winBet()
      Awards winnings for the main bet to the player's balance.

    • winSplitBet

      public void winSplitBet()
      Awards winnings for the split bet to the player's balance.

    • tieBet

      public void tieBet()
      Returns the main bet to the player's balance in case of a tie.

    • tieSplitBet

      public void tieSplitBet()
      Returns the split bet to the player's balance in case of a tie.

    • loseSplitBet

      public void loseSplitBet()
      Handles loss of the split bet (no action needed as bet is already deducted).
